# Godzilla

name: Memory Sinister Level
author: jgduff1
mode: once
w32 34097084 41C88005
w32 34097088 41C88005

author: jgduff1
mode: once
w32 001AF200 60000000
w32 001AF260 7CDC2D2E
w32 001AF2CC 60000000
w32 001AF2D4 7C3C252E
